subcodes.first_line: O thou respected truth seeker! Thy letter was received. It reflected the sentiment of the oneness of the world of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حقیقتجوی محترم نامه تو رسید حکایت از وحدت عالم انسانی مینمود علمی که
subcodes.subjects: @power of faith; power of the spirit, @war and peace, @religion as reality; definitions of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
